title: [codereview-pass2-security] coap_dtn.c: static buffer not protected against concurrent access from CoAP and routing threads
description: coap_dtn.c:15,22-32 - lichen_dtn_buffer is not thread-safe; CoAP handlers and router/rpl can race on buffer. Needs mutex or atomic ops per c-safety.md. P0 codereview
close_reason: Fixed in one pass with 12 codereviews across init buffer handler expiry chunks; all 3 passes clean per chunk; Zephyr native_sim and DTN pytest passed with independent vectors; mutex added per security; full lichen_dtn_buffer integration and GET handler with SenML/OSCORE per spec
